zh.lifeSummary: 當Mercy Brown於1699年11月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞時，她的父親Lieutenant James Brown Jr.44歲，母親Margaret Denison42歲。她於1725年5月24日與Jedediah Carpenter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1751年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mercy Brown于1699年11月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞时，她的父亲Lieutenant James Brown Jr.44岁，母亲Margaret Denison42岁。她于1725年5月24日与Jedediah Carpenter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1751年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brown
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

variants.name: Brunson
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English personal name Brun (Old English Brūna or Old Norse Brúni) + -son ‘Brown's son’. See Brown . There may also be occasional survivals of an Old English compound personal name Brūnsunu ‘brown son’, attested in the Domesday Book, and presumably given to a child with brown hair or complexion. Whether it was also used as an adult nickname is uncertain. This form of the surname is most common in Norfolk.

variants.name: Browning
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Brouning (Old English Brūning), a derivative of the byname Brūn (see Brown ).

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Browning was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Browne
meanings: English: variant of   Brown  .
Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Burnett
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Tyrone and Antrim): descriptive nickname of Norman origin, from Old French burnete, a diminutive of brun ‘brown’ (see Brown ), or possibly in some instances a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of burnete, a high quality woolen cloth, originally dark brown in color.
Probably also an altered form of English   Barnett  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Burnet  ; compare   Burnette  .

variants.name: Erjavec
meanings: Slovenian: nickname from an old spelling of rjavec, most commonly meaning ‘dark skinned man’ and ‘brown horse’. Compare Brown .

variants.name: Borron
meanings: Scottish: perhaps a variant of   Brown   in a Scottish pronunciation. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Broun
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Lyubov, Sergey.
Scottish: variant of   Brown  .
Jewish: variant of   Braun  .

nameMeanings.name: Mercy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality of magnanimity, and in particular God's forgiveness of sinners, a quality much prized in Christian tradition. The word is derived from Latin merces, which originally meant ‘wage’ or ‘reward’ ( see Mercedes ). The name was in regular use from the mid 15th century onwards and was favoured by the Puritans; Mercy is the companion of Christiana in the second part of John Bunyan's Pilgrim's Progress ( 1684 ). Subsequently, it fell out of use as a given name. In modern use, this is often an Anglicized form of Mercedes.

en.lifeSummary: When Mercy Brown was born on 25 November 1699, in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Lieutenant James Brown Jr., was 44 and her mother, Margaret Denison, was 42. She married Jedediah Carpenter on 24 May 1725, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 23 December 1751, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mercy Brown est née le 25 novembre 1699, à Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Lieutenant James Brown Jr., avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Denison, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Jedediah Carpenter le 24 mai 1725, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1751, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mercy Brown am 25. November 1699 in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lieutenant James Brown Jr. 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Denison 42. Sie hat am 24. Mai 1725 in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Jedediah Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1751 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mercy Brown è nata il il 25 novembre 1699 nel Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Lieutenant James Brown Jr., aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Denison, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Jedediah Carpenter il 24 maggio 1725, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1751, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mercy Brownが1699年11月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルスワンセアで生まれた時，父Lieutenant James Brown Jr.は44歳，母Margaret Denisonは42歳であった。1725年5月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスでJedediah Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1751年12月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mercy Brown(이)가 1699년 11월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 스완시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lieutenant James Brown Jr.(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Denison(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1725년 5월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 Jedediah Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1751년 12월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mercy Brown nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1699, em Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Lieutenant James Brown Jr., tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Denison, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Jedediah Carpenter em 24 de maio de 1725, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1751, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mercy Brown родилась 25 ноября 1699 г. в местности свансеа, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Lieutenant James Brown Jr. было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Denison, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jedediah Carpenter 24 мая 1725 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 23 декабря 1751 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mercy Brown nació el 25 de noviembre de 1699, en Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Lieutenant James Brown Jr., tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Denison, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Jedediah Carpenter el 24 de mayo de 1725, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1751, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años.
